locator.quote: fc cost is partially substitutable for naked

text: fc cost is partially substitutable for naked variance in locked_per_std: two agents with identical day_pnl can score 3.8× differently if one converts variance into bounded fc cost.

locator.quote: 3.6× (−£251/d vs −£69/d) because training at fc=120 with a

text: tnv2 REGRESSED: locked floor was higher than layq but force-close cost climbed 3.6× (−£251/d vs −£69/d) because training at fc=120 with a locked-rewarding selector produced volume-of-opens agents.

locator.quote: day_pnl directly so the GA can't game the locked floor without

text: The tnv3 fix switched the selector numerator to day_pnl directly so the GA can't game the locked floor without paying for fc.
